title: Hakea dixoniana
taxonomy: Hakea dixoniana is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Proteaceae. It is native to Western Australia. The plant is a member of the genus Hakea, which consists of over 150 species of shrubs and trees. Hakea dixoniana is further classified as a member of the subfamily Proteoideae. The plant is endemic to the southwestern region of Western Australia.
